top3.sql:
SELECT SUM(t.Amount) 
FROM transactions_1k t
JOIN customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE c.Segment = 'KAM' 
  AND strftime('%Y-%m', t.Date) = '2013-05';

SELECT SUM(t.Amount) AS total_consumption
FROM transactions_1k t
JOIN customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE c.Segment = 'KAM'
  AND strftime('%Y-%m', t.Date) = '2013-05';

SELECT SUM(t.Amount) 
FROM transactions_1k t
JOIN customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE c.Segment = 'KAM' 
  AND strftime('%Y-%m', t.Date) = '2013-05';

WITH kam_transactions AS (
    SELECT t.Amount
    FROM transactions_1k t
    JOIN customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Segment = 'KAM'
      AND strftime('%Y-%m', t.Date) = '2013-05'
)
SELECT SUM(Amount)
FROM kam_transactions;

SELECT SUM(ym.Consumption) AS total_consumption
FROM yearmonth ym
JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE c.Segment = 'KAM'
  AND strftime('%Y-%m', ym.Date) = '2013-05';

SELECT SUM(t.Amount) 
FROM transactions_1k t
JOIN customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE c.Segment = 'KAM' 
  AND strftime('%Y-%m', t.Date) = '2013-05';

WITH kam_transactions AS (
    SELECT t.Amount
    FROM transactions_1k t
    JOIN customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Segment = 'KAM'
      AND strftime('%Y-%m', t.Date) = '2013-05'
)
SELECT SUM(Amount)
FROM kam_transactions;

SELECT SUM(consumption) AS total_consumption
FROM yearmonth
WHERE CustomerID IN (
    SELECT CustomerID
    FROM customers
    WHERE Segment = 'KAM'
)
AND strftime('%Y-%m', Date) = '2013-05';

SELECT SUM(t.Amount) 
FROM transactions_1k t
JOIN customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE c.Segment = 'KAM' 
  AND strftime('%Y-%m', t.Date) = '2013-05';
